events.title: Q1 2026 Board Meeting
events.location: ACME Corp Headquarters, Executive Boardroom, 25th Floor, 200 Park Avenue, New York, NY 10166

events.title: Q1 2026 Board of Directors Meeting
events.location: ACME Corp Headquarters, Executive Boardroom, 25th Floor, 200 Park Avenue, New York, NY 10166 (or via Zoom: Meeting ID 987 654 3210)
events.description: Official Q1 2026 Board of Directors Meeting. In-person at ACME Corp Headquarters or via Zoom video conference (ID: 987 654 3210, Passcode: Board2026). Agenda includes: Call to Order (10:00 AM), CEO Report (10:15 AM), CFO Financial Review (11:00 AM), Working Lunch (12:00 PM), Strategic Initiatives (1:00 PM), Committee Reports (2:30 PM), New Business (3:30 PM), and Adjournment (4:00 PM). Board materials will be distributed one week prior. Attendance confirmation required by March 1st, 2026.

events.title: Board Meeting Attendance Confirmation Deadline
events.description: Deadline to confirm attendance for the Q1 2026 Board of Directors Meeting scheduled for March 15, 2026. Recipients must respond to the Board Secretary by this date.

events.title: Board Meeting Materials Distribution
events.description: Board materials for the Q1 2026 Board of Directors Meeting will be distributed one week prior to the meeting (approximately March 8, 2026).
